languages.text: {n}Весь облик {g|Encyclopedia:Manipulus}манипулуса{/g} вспыхивает энтузиазмом. С крайней аккуратностью мехадендриты Эоганна тянутся к нутру мутанта, выпуская из себя иглы и ланцеты.{/n} "Что за отменный экземпляр генетической скверны, Нунциус! Обрати внимание: все эти изменения отнюдь не случайны. В них есть структура и заложенный эволюционный смысл... В него явно была заложена метаморфоза, но какая? Да, Нунциус, ксеносское происхождение весьма вероятно".

{n}The {g|Encyclopedia:Manipulus}Manipulus{/g}'s entire face lights up with enthusiasm. Eogunn's mechadendrites extend toward the mutant's abdomen with perfect precision, bristling with needles and lancets.{/n} "What a fine specimen of genetic corruption, Nuncius! Take note: all these changes are by no means random. They have structure and inherent evolutionary purpose... Metamorphosis has been planted within him, but of what kind? Indeed, Nuncius, xenos origin is highly probable."

languages.text: {n}El rostro del {g|Encyclopedia:Manipulus}manipulus{/g} se ilumina con entusiasmo. Las mecadendritas de Eogunn se extienden hacia el abdomen del mutante con precisión, llenas de agujas y lancetas.{/n} «¡Es un ejemplar excelente de corrupción genética, Nuncius! Apunte: estos cambios no son en absoluto aleatorios. Son estructurados y tienen un propósito evolutivo inherente... Se le ha inducido una metamorfosis, pero ¿de qué tipo? Efectivamente, Nuncius, coincido en que el origen xenos es más que probable».

Efectivamente, Nuncius, coincido en que el origen xenos es más que probable».

languages.text: {n}{g|Encyclopedia:Manipulus}操纵者{/g}整张脸都焕发出了狂热的光彩。伊奥贡的机械触须以极致的精准度伸向那变种人的腹部，上面密密麻麻的针头和手术刀寒光凛凛。{/n}“多么精妙的基因腐化样本啊，努恩修斯！注意看，所有这些变化绝非随机。它们自有其结构以及内在的演化目的……某种异质已被植入其体内，但这是何种异质呢？你说得对，努恩修斯，的确很可能是异形异质。”
languages.original_text: {n}The {g|Encyclopedia:Manipulus}Manipulus{/g}'s entire face lights up with enthusiasm. Take note: all these changes are by no means random. They have structure and inherent evolutionary purpose... Metamorphosis has been planted within him, but of what kind? Indeed, Nuncius, xenos origin is highly probable."

traits.locale_text: {n}{g|Encyclopedia:Manipulus}操纵者{/g}整张脸都焕发出了狂热的光彩。伊奥贡的机械触须以极致的精准度伸向那变种人的腹部，上面密密麻麻的针头和手术刀寒光凛凛。{/n}“多么精妙的基因腐化样本啊，努恩修斯！注意看，所有这些变化绝非随机。它们自有其结构以及内在的演化目的……某种异质已被植入其体内，但这是何种异质呢？你说得对，努恩修斯，的确很可能是异形异质。”

languages.text: {n}Un sourire enthousiaste illumine le visage entier du {g|Encyclopedia:Manipulus}manipulus{/g}. Les mécadendrites d'Eogunn, hérissées d'aiguilles et de lames, s'approchent de l'abdomen du mutant d'un mouvement précis.{/n} « C'est un spécimen fascinant de corruption génétique, Nuncius ! Prends note : aucune de ces modifications n'a été laissée au hasard. Ils sont structurés et ont une visée évolutive inhérente... Une métamorphose a été implantée en lui, mais de quelle sorte ? Effectivement, Nuncius, il est fort probable qu’elle soit d’origine xénos. »
languages.original_text: {n}The {g|Encyclopedia:Manipulus}Manipulus{/g}'s entire face lights up with enthusiasm. Eogunn's mechadendrites extend toward the mutant's abdomen with perfect precision, bristling with needles and lancets.{/n} "What a fine specimen of genetic corruption, Nuncius! Take note: all these changes are by no means random. They have structure and inherent evolutionary purpose... Metamorphosis has been planted within him, but of what kind? Indeed, Nuncius, xenos origin is highly probable."

Prends note : aucune de ces modifications n'a été laissée au hasard. Ils sont structurés et ont une visée évolutive inhérente... Une métamorphose a été implantée en lui, mais de quelle sorte ? Effectivement, Nuncius, il est fort probable qu’elle soit d’origine xénos. »

languages.text: {n}{g|Encyclopedia:Manipulus}Manipülus'un{/g} yüzü coşkuyla aydınlanıyor. Eogunn'un iğne ve neşterlerle donanmış mekadentritleri, mükemmel bir hassasiyetle mutantın karnına doğru uzanıyor.{/n} "Ne mükemmel bir genetik bozulma örneği Nuncius! Not al: Tüm bu değişiklikler kesinlikle rastgele değil. Yapıları ve kendilerine özgü evrimsel amaçları var... İçine başkalaşım yerleştirilmiş ama ne türden? Gerçekten de Nuncius, zeno kökenli olması kuvvetle muhtemel."
languages.original_text: {n}The {g|Encyclopedia:Manipulus}Manipulus{/g}'s entire face lights up with enthusiasm. Take note: all these changes are by no means random. They have structure and inherent evolutionary purpose... Metamorphosis has been planted within him, but of what kind? Indeed, Nuncius, xenos origin is highly probable."

Gerçekten de Nuncius, zeno kökenli olması kuvvetle muhtemel."

languages.text: {n}{g|Encyclopedia:Manipulus}マニピュルス{/g}の顔全体が熱意に輝いた。エオガンの機械触手が、針とランセットを林立させながら、完璧な精密さで突然変異体の腹部へと伸びていく。{/n}「なんと見事な遺伝的腐敗の標本でしょう、ヌンキウス！ 記録してください――これらの変化はいずれも決して無作為ではありません。それらには構造と、内在する進化上の目的があるのです……変態が彼の内に植え付けられている、だがどのような種類のものか？ まさに、ヌンキウス、異種族起源の可能性が高いですね」

Indeed, Nuncius, xenos origin is highly probable."

languages.text: {n}Der {g|Encyclopedia:Manipulus}Manipulus{/g} strahlt vor Enthusiasmus über das ganze Gesicht. Eogunns mit Nadeln und Skalpellen besetzte Mechadendriten nähern sich mit perfekter Präzision dem Abdomen des Mutanten.{/n} "Was für ein schönes Beispiel für genetische Verderbnis, Nuncius! Bitte notiert Euch: All diese Veränderung sind keineswegs Zufall. Sie haben eine Struktur und einen inhärenten evolutionären Zweck ..." Er ist von Metamorphose beseelt, aber welcher Art? Ja, Nuncius, eine Xenos-Herkunft ist sehr wahrscheinlich."
